description: A debate on whether every large application should launch its own Layer 1 (L1) or Layer 2 (L2) blockchain, featuring insights from industry experts.
topic_summary: The discussion highlights the lifecycle of applications transitioning from general-purpose chains to their own L1 or L2 solutions, driven by the need for economic control, customization of block space, and the limitations of existing networks like Solana [t=58:85].
